archive_safety_synthesis.key_innovation: Proactive guidance pattern - inject context to cause Claude to read before archiving instead of blocking operations

evolution.v2.0: Blocking approach - frustrating UX with multiple turns
evolution.v3.0: Proactive guidance - allows operation but injects 'must read first' context
evolution.v3.1: Anti-laziness validation - requires explicit confirmation with line count
evolution.v3.2_final: Smart pre-archive - block early with clear message, validate strictly

safety_rules: Agent delegation - only DirectoryOrganizer archives files
Read-before-archive - must read file content first
Permanent value protection (location-aware) - /working/ vs /docs/ different rules
Root archive preference - use /archive/ not subdirectory archives
Critical location warnings - MEMORY.md, CLAUDE.md, README.md protected
critical_insights: PreToolUse runs BEFORE current operation writes to transcript - can't see 'will read'
additionalContext field allows injecting instructions to guide Claude's behavior
Multi-layer validation: technical (Read tool params) + behavioral (explicit confirmation)
Location-aware rules: /working/ permanent files go to /docs/, /docs/ permanent need metadata update first
